name: email-campaign
description: Build verified outreach lists: find target companies, pull domain emails, find a specific person's email, verify deliverability, enrich a lead, and pull company firmographic context — all via MPP merchants (Hunter, Apollo, Abstract Company Enrichment via Locus) routed through the SELAT Router.

industry.description: Industry filter for the Fiber company-search step

domain.description: Target company domain for Hunter domain-search, email-finder, and the Abstract Company Enrichment lookup

firstName.description: First name for the Hunter email-finder lookup and Apollo people-enrichment

lastName.description: Last name for the Hunter email-finder lookup and Apollo people-enrichment

company.description: Company name (sent as organization_name) for the Apollo people-enrichment step

email.description: Email address to verify (deliverability + bounce check) with Hunter email-verifier

steps.label: emails by domain — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
find person email — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
verify deliverability — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
bounce check — Hunter (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich lead — Apollo (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company context — Abstract Company Enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
